## Feature Proposal
A clear and concise description of what the feature is.

## Problem Statement / Use Case
Describe the problem this feature solves and why it is useful for the project.

## Proposed Implementation Details
Describe how you think this feature could be implemented within the codebase, if applicable.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or code examples here.
